heading: New Hampshire
label: 109 New Hampshire
text: New Hampshire constitutes one judicial district.Court shall be held at Concord and Littleton.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 28, U.S.C., 1940 ed., § 175 (, ; , ; , ).Mar. 3, 1911, ch. 231, § 9536 Stat. 1119Aug. 23, 1912, ch. 34437 Stat. 357Feb. 20, 1926, ch. 2344 Stat. 8Changes in arrangement and phraseology were made.
